### [Recall(UK) · MHRA] Cutaneous solution applicator recall — **{{TITLE_ISSUE}}** {{W1}} `Evidence A` · `MHRA Inspectorate` · `Signal Med (T2)` · `Recall`
**발행일**2026-07-13
**문서번호**`el26a34`
**Class**Class 2
**업체**Example Pharma UK Ltd
**원문 및 번역** > A manufacturer is recalling batches of a 2% w/v / 70% v/v cutaneous solution 1mL applicator due to a potential breach of sterility in the packaging process. {{W4}} **핵심 사실** `근거: Intake raw` {{W5}} **시사점** {{W6}} **점검 사항** {{W7}} **출처** 정보출처/공식원본 [링크](https://www.gov.uk/drug-device-alerts/class-2-medicines-recall-el-26-a-34)
